title: Cast SMP Resource pack
description: Adds the mythic scrolls from the Cast SMP
body:
This resource pack adds: 
- adrenaline cast
- puppet cast
- plague cast
- solar cast
- anchor cast
- resonant cast
- rime cast
- lunar cast
- vital cast
- nimbus cast
- terra cast
- necro cast
- abyssal cast
- helix cast
